content.query:
IF NOT EXISTS (SELECT * FROM sys.objects O JOIN sys.schemas S ON O.schema_id = S.schema_id WHERE O.NAME = 'fips_state_county_code_t' AND O.TYPE = 'U' AND S.NAME = 'dim')

CREATE TABLE dim.tmp
	(
	 [STATE] nvarchar(50),
	 [STATEFP] nvarchar(50),
	 [COUNTYFP] nvarchar(50),
	 [COUNTYNS] nvarchar(50),
	 [COUNTYNAME] nvarchar(100),
	 [CLASSFP] nvarchar(50),
	 [FUNCSTAT] nvarchar(50)
	)
WITH
	(
	DISTRIBUTION = ROUND_ROBIN,
	 CLUSTERED COLUMNSTORE INDEX
	 -- HEAP
	)
GO

COPY INTO dim.tmp
(STATE 1, STATEFP 2, COUNTYFP 3, COUNTYNS 4, COUNTYNAME 5, CLASSFP 6, FUNCSTAT 7)
FROM 'https://deidstrgeaccdevelopment.dfs.core.windows.net/lexisnexis/dimension_tables/fips_county_class_code.csv'
WITH
(
	FILE_TYPE = 'CSV'
	,MAXERRORS = 0
	,FIELDTERMINATOR = '|'
	,FIRSTROW =  1
	,ERRORFILE = 'https://deidstrgeaccdevelopment.dfs.core.windows.net/lexisnexis/'
)
--END
GO

CREATE TABLE dim.fips_state_county_code_t
	(
	 [state] nvarchar(50),
	 [county_name] nvarchar(100),
	 [fips_state] nvarchar(50),
	 [fips_state_county] nvarchar(50)
	)
WITH
	(
	DISTRIBUTION = ROUND_ROBIN,
	 CLUSTERED COLUMNSTORE INDEX
	 -- HEAP
	)
GO

insert into dim.fips_state_county_code_t
SELECT state, COUNTYNAME, STATEFP, concat(STATEFP, COUNTYFP) FROM dim.tmp;

drop TABLE dim.tmp;
